decoding.effective_top_p_note: vLLM normalizes top-p to 1.0 for temperature-zero greedy decoding

expanded_fallback_profile.activation: Only instances with no applicable compact-profile patch
expanded_fallback_profile.selection_rule: Reuse a compact patch when available; otherwise use the first applicable expanded fallback patch

patch_format: SEARCH/REPLACE converted to unified diff and checked against the base commit
timeout_outcome: Unresolved; preserve the harness-confirmed patch-application status
test_oracle_use: Official evaluation only; never used in generation, retry activation, or patch selection
input_boundary: Original issue title/body and selected base-commit code only
